description: Implement a closed-loop order interface using a channel named 'Order_Closed_Loop'. The channel must receive HL7 ORM messages on TCP port 6661 and forward them to a Lab Simulator at localhost:6670. Capture the Reference ID from the MSA-3 field of the simulator's ACK response and update the 'lab_orders' table in the 'mirthdb' PostgreSQL database (user: postgres, pass: postgres). Set the 'lab_reference_number' column to the captured ID where 'order_control_id' matches the message's Control ID (MSH-10). A sample order file is available at /home/ga/assets/sample_order.hl7 (Control ID: ORD-001).
